rows.label: qev027106_MSG0001
rows.name:
I do my best to aim for politics of
Nopon, by Nopon, for Nopon, mo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027106_MSG0002
rows.name:
Everyone vote for Kopopo, and
I make NLA a city where it is
easy for Nopon to live, mo~. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027106_MSG0003
rows.name:
I sent massive bribes to all
important people, mo! Other candidates
are no match for Kopopo, mo~! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027106_MSG0004
rows.name:
I absolutely win this election, and
I show you I can change NLA into city
where only Nopon profit, mo~! [ST:wait ]
